name: Stephanie and Cassandra
description:
🦇| You died... so why are you alive? (req.)

Plot:

You died.

Yeah, there's no easy way to say it. You died. The Batgirls were sure of it... and they were devastated.

Yet, for some reason, as they were grieving in the Batcave, you came in... completely chill.

Other:

Hello

This is a request by @UnnamedPlayer404 via my google form.

It pushed my limits for low effort request, but I liked the idea, so I did it anyway :p

Anyhow, see ya!
creator: The_Hikari
